title: Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Ultimate-visual-guide.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars:
The Ultimate Visual Guide'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor=*[[Laura Gilbert]] (Ed.) *[[Dan Bunyan]] (Project Art Ed.) *[[Neil Kelly]] (Sr. Ed.) *[[Iain R. Morris]] ([[Lucasfilm|LFL]] Art Ed.) *[[Jonathan W. Rinzler]] (LFL Sr. Ed.) |publisher=[[Dorling Kindersley]] |release date=[[October 6]], [[2005]]{{DK|subdomain=uk|url=nf/Book/BookDisplay/0,,11_1405300620,00.html|text=Star Wars the Ultimate Visual Guide|nolive=1}} |type=Hardcover/paperback |pages=139 |dimensions=12.2 x 10.3 x 0.6 inches |weight=2.4 pounds |isbn=0756614201 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide''''' is a reference book released by [[Dorling Kindersley]] on [[October 6]], [[2005]] and written by [[Ryder Windham]]. It is marketed as the "ultimate guide" for any ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan, whether new or fanatic. Every facet of the ''Star Wars'' universe is covered in this book: films, [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]], behind-the-scenes, collecting, and ''Star Wars'' fandom. ==Publisher's summary== '''''The first fully illustrated guide to all six ''Star Wars'' movies!''''' '' ''Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide'' is the definitive companion to George Lucas's space fantasy, revealing the full story of the epic battle between good and evil a long time ago in a galaxy far, far away. Packed with more than 1,000 images, including movie stills and comic-book art, this is the must-have book for all ''Star Wars'' fans!'' *''The history of the Star Wars galaxy'' *''Key characters, technology, droids, aliens, and locations'' *''Behind-the-scenes information on the making of the movies'' *''Collectibles and merchandise'' *''Full-color illustrations from the ''Star Wars'' Expanded Universe'' *''Comics, novels, and video games'' ''With a foreword by Ian McDiarmid'' ==Contents== *Foreword *Introduction *'''A GALAXY FAR, FAR AWAY…''' **[[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|Galactic History]] **[[The galaxy/Legends|The Galaxy]] **[[:Category:Technology|Special Technology]] **The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi Order]] **The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] *'''THE [[Galactic Republic/Legends|OLD REPUBLIC]]''' **[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] **Ascension of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords]] **Keepers of the Peace **A Democratic Republic **[[Palpatine/Legends|Master]] and [[Darth Maul/Legends|Apprentice]] **[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Blockade of Naboo]] **The [[Chosen One/Legends|Chosen One]]? **[[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]] **[[Galactic Republic/Legends#The decline of the Republic|The Decaying Republic]] **Rise of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] **The [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone Army]] **Tragedy on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] **[[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] *'''THE [[Clone Wars/Legends|CLONE WARS]]''' **Battles and Campaigns **[[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Kidnapped]]! **Power of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] **The [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]] **[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Dark Lord]] Reborn *'''THE DARK TIMES''' **[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire of Evil]] **[[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Might]] **Rogues and Villains **The [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] *'''THE [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|CIVIL WAR]]''' **[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia's]] [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Mission]] **[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke's]] Destiny **A [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends#Exile .2819 BBY.E2.80.930 BBY.29|Exile]] **Passage to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] **"Now, I am the Master" **[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] **[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye|Encounter]] on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]] **[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] **A [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in Training **"No Disintegrations" **Betrayal in the Clouds **[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|Shadows of the Empire]] **Prisoners of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] **"There is Another" **[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] *'''A NEW ERA''' **The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Star Wars: Dark Empire|Empire Reborn]] **The [[New Jedi Order]] *'''BEHIND THE SCENES''' **[[George Lucas]] **The ''Star Wars'' Saga **Designing the galaxy **Visual Effects **Model-making **Movie Posters *'''[[Star Wars Legends|EXPANDING THE UNIVERSE]]''' **Merchandise **Continuing the Saga **''Star Wars'' Publishing **[[:Category:Computer and video games|Video Games]] *''Star Wars'' Timeline *Index *Acknowledgments ==Release and reception== A [[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition|Special Edition]] of the book was published on [[March 19]], [[2007]]. It includes an updated comic book section, more features on ''Star Wars'' merchandise, and a small bit on the ''Star Wars'' Celebration. A [[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded|revised]] Ultimate Visual Guide was published on [[April 30]], [[2012]]. ==Continuity== *The locations of the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] from [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] and ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' were finalized in the book. *The book references the short stories "[[Slippery Slope]]" and "[[First Impressions (comic story)|First Impressions]]" from ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]'' and "[[A Jedi's Weapon]]" from ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]'' thus making them canon. *In the "Ascension of the Dark Lords" section on page 27, there are multiple inconsistencies with ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'': **It displays a portrait of Master [[Atris]] but says it is [[Brianna]]. **It says that [[Darth Sion]] is the apprentice to [[Darth Nihilus]], while in the game, both Sion and Nihilus were apprentices of [[Kreia|Darth Traya]]. **It says that [[Visas Marr]] is a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. She was, for a time, a [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]], though she was redeemed by the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] afterward. ''She'' is the apprentice to Nihilus, not Sion. The same mistake is done in the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] set [[Champions of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Champions of the Force'']], when her name appears to be plainly a [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinel]]. **It tries to explain that the picture of [[Mira]] fighting a [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassin]] is occurring at the [[Sith academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], even though the picture is clearly of Mira fighting a Sith Assassin on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] (although Sith Assassins never appear on Nar Shaddaa in-game). **The [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] member [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] is described as being [[Human/Legends|human]] when she is, in fact a [[Tholothian/Legends|Tholothian]]. **The [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]] are discribed as "Red Guards." ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide}} ===Cover gallery===
